pageSubtitle: Interviews, counselling, and admission strategies for GATE EE qualifiers.
bannerText: Connect with our GATE EE mentors who have secured AIR under 100 and are currently placed in top PSUs like PGCIL & NTPC, or pursuing M.Tech at IISc/IITs.

topics.title: M.Tech Admissions (COAP & CCMT)
topics.description: Navigate centralized portals for IITs (COAP) and NITs (CCMT).
points: Target Power Systems, Power Electronics, and Control Systems at top IITs.
Track individual IIT application deadlines for EE specializations.

topics.title: PSU Interview Preparation
topics.description: Crack technical & HR rounds at major PSUs like PGCIL, NTPC, ONGC.
points: Revise Machines and Power Systems—expect deep cross-questioning.
Prepare for practical scenario-based questions (e.g., grid failure, fault analysis).
Stay updated with India's renewable energy sector and EV policies.

topics.title: SOP & Research Proposal
topics.description: Drafting the perfect SOP for MS/Ph.D. in Electrical Engineering.
points: Align your B.Tech project with the professor's research in Smart Grids or Drives.
Highlight simulation skills (MATLAB/Simulink) strongly in your SOP.
Secure strong Letters of Recommendation (LORs) from core EE faculty.

topics.title: Written Tests & Institute Interviews
topics.description: Tackle institute-specific written tests for direct Ph.D. or MS programs.
points: Brush up on Engineering Math and Networks—heavily tested in written rounds.
Be prepared to draw and analyze circuits on a whiteboard.
Practice deriving formulas for control system stability.
